spacing_and_layout.card_style: flat background (#0A0A0A), 1px solid border (#222222), no drop shadow. rounded-none or rounded-sm max.

components.navbar: Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60, 1px bottom border border-white/10. Sticky top with z-50.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200 transition-colors rounded-sm px-6 py-3 font-medium text-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-zinc-300 border border-zinc-800 hover:border-zinc-600 hover:text-white transition-all rounded-sm px-6 py-3 text-sm
buttons.accent: bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors rounded-sm px-6 py-3 text-sm

components.cards: border border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950/50 rounded-sm p-6 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-zinc-600 transition-all duration-300
components.inputs: bg-black border border-zinc-800 text-white rounded-sm focus:border-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white transition-all
components.badges: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 text-zinc-300 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

animations.entrance: staggered fade-in-up for lists and grid items
animations.effects: Use subtle 'Tracing Beam' or glowing border effects on active memory packages to signify processing state.

hero_background.description: Intricate vertical wire mesh pattern for abstract tech background
hero_background.usage: Apply with heavy dark overlay (e.g., bg-black/80 or gradient) to provide subtle texture in the hero section without compromising text readability.

accessibility.focus: Clear focus rings on all interactive elements. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white/20 focus:outline-none.
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='paste-transcript-input').

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a deep dark theme following Archetype 4 rules. Use stark black (#050505) and white (#FAFAFA) to create a premium developer tool aesthetic.
Use 'The Grid Borders' surface strategy for the workspace and dashboard: visible grid lines, dense layout, zero border radius or max 4px (rounded-sm).
In the Hero section, use the provided abstract background image with a heavy overlay to add texture while keeping the focus on the typography.
Typography must use JetBrains Mono for headings, overlines, and labels to reinforce the 'developer tool' identity, paired with Inter for readable body text.
All components should use Shadcn but heavily customized to strip their default 'softness'—make borders 1px solid, remove large drop shadows, and use sharp corners.
Implement Google Login styling (black button, white text, subtle border) and structured views for the memory package output.
Memory package viewer must clearly demarcate sections (project goal, current state, architecture decisions, etc.) using crisp borders and mono-spaced labels.
Ensure dark/light mode toggle exists, though dark mode is the default and primary focus.
Remember to include data-testid attributes on all interactive elements as per the testing requirements.
